technicalArchitecture: IoT Sensor Data Ingestion (AWS IoT Core / MQTT Broker)
Real-Time Streaming Data Pipeline (Kafka / Upstash)
Anomaly Detection & Failure Prediction Model (Python + Replicate API)
Machine Health Dashboard (Next.js + Recharts + Supabase Realtime)
Alert Escalation & Work Order Creation (Twilio + CMMS API)

traditionalAgencyEstimate.teamRequired: 1 PM, 1 IoT Engineer, 1 ML Engineer, 2 Full-Stack Developers

mr2LabsHook: Unplanned downtime costs manufacturers thousands per hour. We build your predictive maintenance MVP before your next major failure event.
